sources.name: Mobalytics — Best Balatro Jokers Tier List (Gold Stake)
Pocket Gamer — Balatro Joker Tier List (June 2026)
TierCards Community — Balatro Ultimate Joker Tier List (All 150 Ranked)
ChoostGames — Balatro Joker Tier List: Ranking Every Card (Gold Stake 2026)
dood.gg — Balatro Gold Stake Guide (joker recommendations)
r/balatro — Community Gold Stake Joker Tier List (Feb 2026)

notes: Methodology: Weighted consensus of 5 primary tier list sources (Mobalytics weight 1.2x as gold-stake focused; PocketGamer, TheGamer, ChoostGames 1.0x; TierCards community 0.9x) plus dood.gg and Reddit commentary for context. Numeric scores mapped: S+/God-Tier=5, S/Elite=4, A/Great=3, B/Decent=2, C/Sell-Early=1, D=0. Missing entries defaulted to 2.0 (B-tier equivalent).

Aggregation rule: Joker must score in S-equivalent (≥3.8 avg) across at least 3 sources to reach S tier. B-tier default applied to genuinely controversial jokers where sources diverged by more than 2 tier levels. Tier sizes: S=12, A=25, B=45, C=45, D=23.

Stake variants: Modified base scores using game-mechanic deltas. White/Red = beginner-friendly adjustments; Green = economy jokers penalized; Black = joker-count synergies boosted; Blue = discard-reliant jokers penalized; Purple = late-game scalers boosted; Orange = economy jokers boosted for pack-cost pressure; Gold = all stacked — only ultra-reliable carries stay S.

Deck variants: Each deck's mechanical rules applied as score deltas. Abandoned deck heavily penalizes face-card jokers (Triboulet, Photograph, Sock & Buskin, Baron drop to D/C). Checkered deck boosts flush/suit jokers. Nebula deck boosts planet/constellation jokers. Painted deck boosts held-in-hand jokers (Baron, Mime, Steel Joker). Erratic deck penalizes rank/suit-specific jokers.

Controversial jokers (defaulted to B-tier): Madness (great at Black stake, useless at White), Pareidolia (sources range from A to D), Four Fingers (build-defining or useless), Hologram (very source-dependent), Bull (economy-dependent). Jokers that appear at fundamentally different tiers were moved to the boundary between their spread.

Known caveats: Tier lists reflect gold stake general consensus; endless-mode runs may differ significantly. Version 1.0.1f and later patches. Driver's License (driver_gloves ID) requires 16 enhanced cards — build-dependent.
